messages.author: Whitetail Wise
messages.text: Was wondering in a future release for repeaters if a scheduler is ever on the road map. For our use, our hunters use the system during the day, many solar repeaters. But we don’t use it at night, especially between say 11pm and 5am. Would be great to save the battery life during that time and have the repeaters go to sleep. And wake up when we need them between 5am and 11pm. Just a thought of a unique case scenario, that would be helpful in extending the life of the repeaters battery.
messages.content_html: Was wondering in a future release for repeaters if a scheduler is ever on the road map. For our use, our hunters use the system during the day, many solar repeaters. But we don’t use it at night, especially between say 11pm and 5am. Would be great to save the battery life during that time and have the repeaters go to sleep. And wake up when we need them between 5am and 11pm. Just a thought of a unique case scenario, that would be helpful in extending the life of the repeaters battery.

messages.author: Whitetail Wise
messages.reply_html:
mcarper
The deep sleep stuff is getting close to being in main for esp32 hardware; deep sleep would make this request not needed
